Mystic, Visionary, Spectre, Enigma, Oracle, Seer. 

In the ethereal realm of foresight, where shadows dance and whispers echo through the corridors of time, these titles weave a tapestry of destiny. Glimpses of the unseen paint a canvas of possibility, while voices from beyond the veil guide the seeker through the labyrinth of existence. A spectral gaze pierces the veil of reality, illuminating paths not yet traversed, while the weight of prophecy hangs heavy in the air, shaping the course of those who dare to listen.
